item.name: Swordtip Squid
item.description:
True to its name, the head of this squid is sharp enough to pierce straight through plate armor.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The sleek, clear body of this wavekin has inspired countless swordsmiths during their seaborne journeys. Opinions are divided on whether the dried swordtip squid or dried spear squid is tastier, with one's martial background apparently being the main indicator of preference.
